scripts.smoke:docker: pnpm --filter=dorkos run build && cd packages/cli && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../ && cd ../.. && docker build -t dorkos-smoke . && docker run --rm dorkos-smoke
scripts.smoke:integration: pnpm --filter=dorkos run build && cd packages/cli && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../ && cd ../.. && docker build -f Dockerfile.integration -t dorkos-integration . && docker run --rm dorkos-integration
scripts.smoke:npm: docker build -f Dockerfile.integration --build-arg INSTALL_MODE=npm -t dorkos-integration:npm . && docker run --rm dorkos-integration:npm
scripts.docker:build: pnpm --filter=dorkos run build && cd packages/cli && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../ && cd ../.. && docker build -f Dockerfile.run -t dorkos .
